text.message: I have no ore, yet been robbed 4 times in a row
At least you got 2 cities as a consolation prize
now you are too strong orange
but he didn't know my motives until then
No wood or brick in hand
Also I need to pace road
If oj loses will be for going greedy on road race
I'm more concerned about my army
I have no ore, can't even build 2 settles
